name: Peruvian Potato Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 small Onion, thinly sliced & separated into rings
2 packages (3 oz each) cream cheese, softened and cut into 1/2 inch cubes
2 small Serrano chilies, seeded & finely chopped
3 Hard-cooked eggs, peeled, cut into fourths
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix onion, lemon juice, 1/2 tsp salt, and ground red pepper in a bowl. Cover and reserve.
2. Heat 1 inch of salt water (1 tbsp salt to 1 cup water) to boiling. Add potatoes and cook until tender, about 20-25 minutes. Drain and cool.
3. Remove potatoes from the pot and cut into fourths.
4. In a separate pan, heat cream cheese, half and half, chilies, 1/4 tsp salt, and ground turmeric over low heat, stirring frequently, until smooth, about 10-12 minutes.
5. Arrange potato portions on lettuce leaves. Spoon the cheese mixture over the potatoes.
6. Drain onion slices and arrange them on top of the cheese and potatoes.
7. Garnish with olives and eggs.
